title: podman pod inspect: needs --format option
body:
```console
$ podman pod inspect --format '{{.Containers.0.id}}' abc
Error: unknown flag: --format
```
Pretty low priority if noone has asked for this yet (I searched)

comments.body: if no body minds I would like to work on this.
@zhangguanzhang Please open a PR to remove it.
I've already got one, it's just pending a few other fixes so it's not a micro PR. I'll get it pushed out today.
